iran_nuke.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 41% (stable). Day 22 Hour 13 UTC. CRITICAL (up). Dimona/Arad injuries confirmed ~200. Iranian cluster bomb attack near Tel Aviv - continued strikes on Israeli population centers. Netanyahu visits Arad, urges world leaders to join campaign. IDF chief: 'war not close to ending.' Natanz struck (no radiation). 400+ missiles at Israel (92% intercepted). Trump 48hr ultimatum ~24hrs to deadline. Updated 2026-03-22T13:04:00Z

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (up). Day 22 Hour 13 UTC. IMMINENT (up). Trump 48hr ultimatum ~24hrs to deadline (~23:44 GMT Mon Mar 24). Trump: 'I don't want a deal' - no diplomatic off-ramp. Iranian cluster bomb attack near Tel Aviv. IDF chief: 'war not close to ending.' UAE intercepted 4 missiles + 25 drones today. Saudi intercepted 60 drones. Saudi + Qatar expelled Iranian diplomats. Iran death toll 1,500+. Updated 2026-03-22T13:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: UAE intercepts 4 ballistic missiles and 25 UAVs launched from Iran TODAY
latest_news.source: Gulf News / UAE Ministry of Defence
latest_news.text: UAE air defence intercepted 4 ballistic missiles + 25 drones from Iran today. Cumulative since war start: 345 ballistic missiles, 15 cruise missiles, 1,773 UAVs intercepted. 2 UAE military + 6 foreign nationals killed, 160 injured.

latest_news.headline: Saudi Arabia intercepts ~60 Iranian drones, 3 ballistic missiles toward Riyadh
latest_news.text: Saudi Arabia intercepted nearly 60 Iranian drones targeting Eastern Province energy facilities. 3 ballistic missiles launched toward Riyadh - 1 intercepted, 2 fell in uninhabited areas. Saudi also expelled Iranian military attache + staff.

latest_news.headline: Iran death toll passes 1,500, 20,984 injured from US-Israeli strikes
latest_news.source: Al Jazeera / Iran Ministry of Health
latest_news.text: Iran state broadcaster confirms 1,500+ killed, 20,984 injured from US-Israeli attacks. 7 hospitals evacuated, 36 ambulances damaged.

latest_news.headline: Israeli strikes hit eastern Tehran - geographic expansion of attacks
latest_news.text: Israel launched new attacks on Tehran on Sunday, explosions reported in the east of the city - further geographic expansion of strikes beyond oil depot/refinery strikes.

iran_conventional.syria_escalation_note: Monitoring. Israel strikes in Sweida province Syria continue. Potential for separate tracker if escalation widens.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 71% (stable). Day 22 Hour 13 UTC. IMMINENT (stable). Hezbollah rocket kills avocado farmer in northern Israel. Israel demolishing Lebanese frontline village homes (accelerated campaign). 1,000+ killed, 1M+ displaced. IDF chief: 'war not close to ending.' IDF soldiers wounded by mortar. Updated 2026-03-22T13:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut - 7 neighborhoods evacuated
latest_news.text: Israeli military strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut early Saturday. Evacuation warnings for 7 neighborhoods in southern suburbs. Jets bombed Beirut at 3am. Ghandouriyeh house strike kills 1, wounds 2.

latest_news.headline: WaPo: Israel strikes Hezbollah health center, kills 12 medical workers
latest_news.text: Israeli strike hit Hezbollah-run health center in southern Lebanon, killed 12 medical workers. Israel widens campaign beyond fighters to civilian infrastructure.

turkey.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 23 auto - DETERRENT (stable). Qatar helicopter crash killed 3 Turkish nationals (technical, not combat). No new Turkey-specific escalation. NATO Patriot at Incirlik stable. Updated 2026-03-22T12:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

india.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 3% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 23 auto - DETERRENT (stable). No new developments. Pezeshkian calls on BRICS (chaired by India) to intervene, but no military escalation. Updated 2026-03-22T12:04:00Z

russia.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 13% (up). Day 22 Hour 13 UTC. DETERRENT (up). Zelensky: 'Putin wants long war in Iran - depletion of US reserves.' US issues 30-day waiver for sanctioned Russian oil purchases. Putin called Iran 'loyal friend.' Oil price shock boosts Russian revenue. Updated 2026-03-22T13:04:00Z

china.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 5% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 23 auto - DETERRENT (stable). No new developments. US-China trade talks continue. Taiwan stable. Updated 2026-03-22T12:04:00Z

north_korea.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 23 auto - DETERRENT (stable). No new developments. SPA session complete. No military activity. Updated 2026-03-22T12:04:00Z

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 29% (up). Day 22 Hour 13 UTC. CRITICAL (up). US-brokered Ukraine-Russia talks in Florida continue, more sessions Sunday. Russia absent from talks. ISW: Russian mechanized assaults intensifying, spring-summer offensive prep. Oil price shock boosts Russian revenue. Peace talks paused due to Iran war. Zelensky: Putin wants long Iran war. Updated 2026-03-22T13:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: US-backed Ukraine-Russia talks continue, more sessions Sunday
latest_news.text: Ukraine and Russia trade strikes as US-brokered talks in Florida continue. Deaths reported on both sides. More negotiating sessions scheduled for Sunday.

latest_news.headline: Russia intensifying mechanized assaults — spring-summer offensive prep
latest_news.text: ISW assessment: Russian forces increasingly conducting mechanized assaults on frontline, possibly part of intensified preparation for Spring-Summer 2026 offensive.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 26% (stable). Day 22 Hour 13 UTC. ELEVATED (stable). Eid ceasefire holding through Mar 24 at Saudi/Qatar/Turkey request. TTP also 3-day truce. Post-Eid resumption feared Mar 25. No new fighting. Updated 2026-03-22T13:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding, TTP also declares 3-day truce
latest_news.text: 5-day Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP separately declares 3-day ceasefire. Qatar welcomes truce. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected.

top_signals: TRUMP 48HR ULTIMATUM ACTIVE: Deadline ~23:44 GMT Mon Mar 24 (~24hrs) - 'obliterate power plants'
Trump: 'I DON'T WANT A DEAL' - no diplomatic off-ramp, says Iran 'blown off the map'
Iranian cluster bomb attack near Tel Aviv - several hurt
IDF Chief: 'War is not close to ending' - open-ended conflict commitment

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: Day 22 Hour 12 UTC. DE-ESCALATION: Pakistan ceasefire to Mar 24. IAEA: no radiation at Dimona. US-China trade talks ongoing. ESCALATION: Trump ultimatum ~37hrs to deadline. Iran: 'irreversible damage' to ALL regional infrastructure. Russia benefits from sanctions waiver. Israel demolishing Lebanese homes. 400+ missiles at Israel. NET: IMMINENT ESCALATION toward ultimatum deadline with RECIPROCAL THREATS intensifying.

latest_news.headline: Iranian cluster bomb attack near Tel Aviv - several hurt
latest_news.text: Several hurt in Iranian cluster bomb attack around Tel Aviv area. Hezbollah rocket kills avocado farmer in northern Israel simultaneously.

latest_news.headline: Trump: 'I don't want a deal' with Iran - no diplomatic off-ramp
latest_news.text: Trump on Truth Social: Iran wants to make a deal but 'I don't!' - says US has 'blown Iran off the map,' leadership gone, navy/air force dead. Contradicts any de-escalation path.

latest_news.headline: IDF Chief of Staff: 'War is not close to ending'
latest_news.text: Israel's army chief Gen. Eyal Zamir says 'the war is not close to ending.' Netanyahu visits Arad strike site, urges world leaders to commit to joint campaign.

latest_news.headline: Netanyahu at Arad: urges world leaders to join US-Israel campaign
latest_news.text: Netanyahu visits Arad missile strike site, urges world leaders to commit their countries to the joint US-Israel military campaign against Iran.

latest_news.headline: Zelensky: Putin wants long war in Iran to deplete US
latest_news.text: Zelensky to BBC: Putin wants long war in Iran to deplete US reserves and air defense manufacturers. US issues 30-day waiver for countries to buy sanctioned Russian oil.

outlook: IMMINENT (Day 22, 13:00 UTC). Trump 48hr ultimatum ~24hrs to deadline. Trump explicitly says 'I don't want a deal' - closing diplomatic door. IDF chief: 'war not close to ending.' Iranian cluster bombs near Tel Aviv. Netanyahu urges world leaders to join campaign. Iran dismissed ultimatum, threatened 'irreversible damage.' Multiple active fronts escalating. Oil crisis deepening. No diplomatic off-ramps visible. Power plant strikes + reciprocal energy retaliation highly likely within 24hrs.
de_escalation_watch: Day 22 Hour 13 UTC. DE-ESCALATION: Pakistan ceasefire to Mar 24. IAEA no radiation at Natanz/Dimona. Zelensky sent negotiators to US. ESCALATION: Trump ultimatum ~24hrs. Trump: 'I don't want a deal.' IDF chief: 'war not close to ending.' Iranian cluster bombs near Tel Aviv. Israel urges world allies to join campaign. Multiple active fronts escalating. NET: IMMINENT ESCALATION toward ultimatum deadline. NO DIPLOMATIC OFF-RAMP. Both sides doubling down.
